name: Winter Squash with Madeira
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, quarter, and seed the squash.
2. Cut into 1/4-inch slices.
3. Heat butter and oil in a pan over medium heat. Saute the squash until lightly browned (about 2-3 minutes).
4. Transfer half of the sauted squash to a prepared 1-quart baking dish.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and pour on half of the cream and Madeira mixture.
6. Top with remaining squash and season again.
7. Pour on the remaining cream and Madeira mixture over the top.
8. In a separate bowl, combine bread crumbs and chopped walnuts with melted butter.
9. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the baked dish.
10. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes or until the squash is tender. Turn off the heat when done.
